title: Pollichia latisepalea
taxonomy: Pollichia latisepalea is a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Pollichia latisepalea includes the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, and the order Santalales.
